name: Chocolate Amaretto Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Blanched almonds (lightly toasted and chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast blanched almonds and chop them.
2. Preheat oven to 375°F.
3. Combine crumbs, almonds, sugar, and butter. Pat the mixture onto the bottom and sides of a 10-inch springform pan.
4. Cream together the cream cheese, sugar, heavy cream, amaretto, and vanilla. Beat in eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Pour the mixture into the crust-lined pan.
6. Bake in the middle of the oven for 1-1/2 hours or until the top cracks and a knife inserted in the center comes out clean. Let stand on a rack for 5 minutes.
7. Combine sour cream, vanilla, and sugar. Mix well and spread evenly over the cake.
8. Return to the oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes. Remove from the oven and let cool completely.
9. Cover lightly with wax paper and let chill overnight. When ready to serve, remove the sides of the pan and garnish with toasted almonds around the outer edge and on top of the cake.
